schema.description: Describes the request body for the /bulkindexgroups API call

uploadId.description: Unique id that must be used for this instance of datasource groups upload

isFirstPage.description: true if this is the first page of the upload. Defaults to false

isLastPage.description: true if this is the last page of the upload. Defaults to false

forceRestartUpload.description: Flag to discard previous upload attempts and start from scratch. Must be specified with isFirstPage=true

groups.description: batch of groups for the datasource

items.description: describes a group in the datasource

name.description: name of the group. Should be unique among all groups for the datasource, and cannot have spaces.

items.title: DatasourceGroupDefinition

disableStaleDataDeletionCheck.description: True if older group data needs to be force deleted after the upload completes. Defaults to older data being deleted only if the percentage of data being deleted is less than a reasonable threshold. This must only be set when `isLastPage = true`

schema.title: BulkIndexGroupsRequest
